definition.name: thouless_length
definition.definition: The Thouless length L(t) = L_0 e^{t/τ}, where τ^{-1} = log((d^2+1)/(2d)) for Haar-random brickwall circuits. Controls the spatial extent of vertical domains in the 2D Ising model and sets the crossover between N·e^{-2t/τ} and e^{-t/τ} scaling regimes. [Ref: Sauliere2026, line 228]
